sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ عَلَيْنَا حِمَايَةُ مَعْلُومَاتِنَا الشَّخْصِيَّةِ عَلَى شَبَكَةِ الْإِنْتَرْنِتِ.
sentences.translation: Moramo zaštititi naše lične informacije na internetu.
sentences.translationEn: We must protect our personal information on the internet.

sentences.arabic: يَخْتَارُ الْمُسْتَخْدِمُ كَلِمَةَ مُرُورٍ قَوِيَّةً لِحِسَابَاتِهِ التِّقْنِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Korisnik bira jaku lozinku za svoje tehničke račune.
sentences.translationEn: The user chooses a strong password for their technical accounts.

sentences.arabic: الْأَمْنُ السِّيبِرَانِيُّ يَحْمِي الْحَوَاسِيبَ مِنَ الْفَيْرُوسَاتِ وَالْمَخَاطِرِ الرَّقْمِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Kibernetička sigurnost štiti računare od virusa i digitalnih opasnosti.
sentences.translationEn: Cybersecurity protects computers from viruses and digital risks.
